structures.name: ForgejoEvent
structures.doc: ForgejoEvent: The structure of a Git event in the research stack.

definitions.name: forgejoPolicy
definitions.doc: Provider-specific cost policy for the Forgejo compatibility shim.

definitions.name: toSourceEvent
definitions.doc: Convert a legacy Forgejo event into the open provenance-source event surface.

definitions.name: forgejoInvariant
definitions.doc: Invariant: Forgejo events are lawful if they originate from an allowed repo and the action is within the prescribed set.

definitions.name: forgejoCost
definitions.doc: Cost function: Measures the "computational friction" of a git event. Events from external authors have higher cost (Q16.16).

definitions.name: forgejoBind
definitions.doc: The Forgejo Bind: Connects an event to the research substrate.

documentation: ForgejoEvent: The structure of a Git event in the research stack.

The Forgejo Bind: Connects an event to the research substrate.
